when_to_use: Cryptographic client-side challenge against bot scripts
Credential stuffing prevention for login without CAPTCHA
Fake account creation blocking for retail loyalty programs
Advanced bot detection for scraping-sensitive API endpoints

pros: Client-side crypto challenges stop solver farms
Strong in retail and fintech ATO use cases
Fast integration on modern web stacks
cons: Less visibility into decisions vs some rivals

review.verdict: A serious invisible-bot-defense option for ATO-heavy e-commerce and fintech, but not self-serve friendly.
review.best_for: Retailers and fintechs fighting credential stuffing and fake-account bots without adding friction.
review.not_for: Small teams without an enterprise budget or static content sites with trivial bot problems.
